'''âj-t-p''' ('''shajatap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:naggle|naggle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:naggle|naggle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-t-p
|-
! Lemma
| shajatap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijatap|thijatap]] || [[word:jijatap|jijatap]] || [[word:shijatap|shijatap]] || [[word:kijatap|kijatap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujatap|thuthujatap]] || [[word:jujujatap|jujujatap]] || [[word:shushujatap|shushujatap]] || [[word:kukujatap|kukujatap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujatap|thujatap]] || [[word:jujatap|jujatap]] || [[word:shujatap|shujatap]] || [[word:kujatap|kujatap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujatap|thujatap]] || [[word:jujatap|jujatap]] || [[word:shujatap|shujatap]] || [[word:kujatap|kujatap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejatap|thejatap]] || [[word:jejatap|jejatap]] || [[word:shejatap|shejatap]] || [[word:kejatap|kejatap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojatap|thothojatap]] || [[word:jojojatap|jojojatap]] || [[word:shoshojatap|shoshojatap]] || [[word:kokojatap|kokojatap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojatap|thojatap]] || [[word:jojatap|jojatap]] || [[word:shojatap|shojatap]] || [[word:kojatap|kojatap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojatap|thojatap]] || [[word:jojatap|jojatap]] || [[word:shojatap|shojatap]] || [[word:kojatap|kojatap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjatap|thĂŠjatap]] || [[word:jĂŠjatap|jĂŠjatap]] || [[word:shĂŠjatap|shĂŠjatap]] || [[word:kĂŠjatap|kĂŠjatap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajatap|thathajatap]] || [[word:jajajatap|jajajatap]] || [[word:shashajatap|shashajatap]] || [[word:kakajatap|kakajatap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajatap|thajatap]] || [[word:jajatap|jajatap]] || [[word:shajatap|shajatap]] || [[word:kajatap|kajatap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajatap|thajatap]] || [[word:jajatap|jajatap]] || [[word:shajatap|shajatap]] || [[word:kajatap|kajatap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajatap|shajatap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajatap|goshajatap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajatap|gokishajatap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajatapnĂŒ|shajatapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajatapnknĂŒ|goshajatapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajatapnĂŒ|gokishajatapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajatapshĂ«|shajatapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajatapnkshĂ«|goshajatapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajatapshĂ«|gokishajatapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajatapro|shajatapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajatapnkro|goshajatapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajatapro|gokishajatapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajatapmu|shajatapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajatapnkmu|goshajatapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajatapmu|gokishajatapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajatapsher|shajatapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajatapnksher|goshajatapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajatapsher|gokishajatapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajatapng|shajatapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajatapnkng|goshajatapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajatapng|gokishajatapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajatapya|shajatapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajatapnkya|goshajatapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajatapya|gokishajatapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajatapyam|shajatapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajatapnkyam|goshajatapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajatapyam|gokishajatapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajatapnĂŒshĂ«|shajatapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajatapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajatapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajatapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajatapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajatapnĂŒro|shajatapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajatapnknĂŒro|goshajatapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajatapnĂŒro|gokishajatapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajatapnĂŒmu|shajatapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajatapnknĂŒmu|goshajatapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajatapnĂŒmu|gokishajatapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajatapshĂ«nĂŒ|shajatapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajatapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajatapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajatapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajatapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajatapshĂ«ro|shajatapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajatapnkshĂ«ro|goshajatapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajatapshĂ«ro|gokishajatapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajatapshĂ«mu|shajatapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajatapnkshĂ«mu|goshajatapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajatapshĂ«mu|gokishajatapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajatapronĂŒ|shajatapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajatapnkronĂŒ|goshajatapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajatapronĂŒ|gokishajatapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajataproshĂ«|shajataproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajatapnkroshĂ«|goshajatapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajataproshĂ«|gokishajataproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajatapromu|shajatapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajatapnkromu|goshajatapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajatapromu|gokishajatapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajatapmunĂŒ|shajatapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajatapnkmunĂŒ|goshajatapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajatapmunĂŒ|gokishajatapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajatapmushĂ«|shajatapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajatapnkmushĂ«|goshajatapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajatapmushĂ«|gokishajatapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajatapmuro|shajatapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajatapnkmuro|goshajatapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajatapmuro|gokishajatapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
